[2026-05-26 17:09:39] 5 + 3 = 8
[2026-05-26 17:09:52] 5 - 3 = 2
[2026-05-26 17:09:56] 5 / 3 = 1.6666666666666667
[2026-05-26 17:09:59] 5 * 3 = 15
[2026-05-26 17:10:03] 5 % 3 = 2
[2026-05-26 17:10:08] 5 // 3 = 1
[2026-05-26 17:10:16] 5 ^ 3 = 125
[2026-05-26 17:10:25] sqrt 5 = 2.23606797749979
[2026-05-26 17:10:42] abs -5 = 5
[2026-05-26 17:10:46] sin 50 = -0.26237485370392877
[2026-05-26 17:10:53] cos -50 = 0.9649660284921133
[2026-05-26 17:10:57] tan 30 = -6.405331196646276
[2026-05-26 17:11:05] fact 5 = 120
